overview: Expose the existing cluster license capability at `c8volt get cluster license`, keep the change aligned with the current `get cluster` Cobra patterns, and complete the feature with focused command tests, regenerated docs, and repository validation.

userStories.title: Establish the cluster license command entry point
userStories.description: Add the nested `get cluster license` Cobra command in the existing command tree and wire it through the current CLI construction path without introducing a parallel command structure.
acceptanceCriteria: `c8volt get cluster license` exists beneath the existing `get cluster` hierarchy.
The command reuses the repository's current Cobra patterns and inherits the standard `get` command behavior.
No alternate direct command such as `c8volt get cluster-license` is introduced.
userStories.notes: Keep this slice limited to command registration and shared wiring in `cmd/`. Reuse the active branch `63-cluster-license` per repository branch guidance.

userStories.title: Deliver observable cluster license retrieval behavior
userStories.description: Connect the new command to the existing cluster service so operators can retrieve license details through the CLI with the repository's standard structured output and defined handling for optional or malformed fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Running `c8volt get cluster license` against a valid environment returns the existing cluster license payload through the standard structured output path.
Optional license fields can be absent without the command inventing values or failing unnecessarily.
Malformed or empty successful responses are surfaced clearly instead of being silently accepted.
userStories.notes: Reuse the existing cluster service and domain payload. Keep the change bounded to CLI exposure of current license behavior rather than redesigning the service layer.

userStories.title: Lock down help discovery and failure semantics with tests
userStories.description: Add focused command coverage for help discovery, successful execution, and representative failures so the new command matches the CLI's established error handling and exit behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Command tests cover `c8volt get --help`, `c8volt get cluster --help`, and `c8volt get cluster license --help` discovery behavior.
Command tests cover a successful `c8volt get cluster license` execution path.
Command tests cover representative failing execution and verify the established exit-code or `os.Exit` behavior for the CLI.
userStories.notes: Follow existing `cmd` testing conventions, including explicit temp `--config` usage and subprocess assertions when failure handling exits the process.

userStories.title: Align documentation and complete repository validation
userStories.description: Update user-facing command references for the new nested license command, regenerate CLI docs from Cobra metadata, and finish with the targeted and repo-wide validation flow.
acceptanceCriteria: README and `docs/index.md` show `c8volt get cluster license` anywhere affected cluster read commands are documented.
CLI reference documentation is regenerated so the new command appears in the generated `docs/cli/` output.
Validation includes `go test ./cmd/... -race -count=1`, `go test ./internal/services/cluster/... -race -count=1`, `make docs`, and `make test`.
userStories.notes: Update source docs first and regenerate derived CLI docs instead of hand-editing generated output.
